query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Gold Falls ₹400 To ₹1,49,200 Per 10 Grams As Surging Oil Prices Weigh On Bullion Market
articles.description: Gold prices fell by Rs 400 to Rs 1,49,200 per 10 grams in the national capital, while silver declined by Rs 300 per kg. Rising crude oil prices, Middle East tensions and inflation concerns triggered profit-booking and strengthened expectations that the US Federal Reserve could keep interest rates higher for longer.

articles.title: Brent crude tops $100 a barrel. How the next stop could be $120
articles.description: Goldman Sachs warns on oil prices and so called tank bottoms ( and loves a new natural gas-related name).

articles.title: US stocks today: Nasdaq plunges over 1.5% as Big Tech earnings rekindle AI spending worries
articles.description: Wall Street opened sharply lower as investor sentiment weakened on renewed concerns over heavy AI spending following Big Tech earnings. Rising oil prices tied to escalating Middle East tensions added pressure. Major indices including the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq posted steep early losses, reflecting risk-off mood across global markets.

articles.title: Escalating Tensions: Trump Threatens Iran Amidst Rising Oil Prices
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has threatened severe military action against Iran following attacks by Houthi fighters on Saudi oil tankers, intensifying the Middle Eastern conflict. The situation has heightened oil prices, exacerbated inflation, and disrupted global shipping routes, with further consequences for diplomatic relations and international trade.

articles.title: Trump vows to punish Iran for Houthi attacks in Red Sea; oil surges over $100
articles.description: By Elwely Elwelly, Ahmed Elimam and Eman AbouhassiraDUBAI, July 23 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump promised on Thursday "major military punishment" for Iran and its Houthi allies, after the Yemeni fighters struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, extending the Middle East war to a second major shipping chokepoint.The prospect that disruption could widen to a second sea sent global oil prices surging in one of the steepest rises of the war. Brent crude rose more than 6%, breaking through $100 a barrel for the first time since May.

articles.title: Wall Street Woes: AI Concerns and Oil Prices Dent Sentiment
articles.description: Wall Street's main indexes fell as AI spending concerns resurfaced following Big Tech earnings reports. Additionally, rising oil prices due to the Middle East conflict contributed to the negative market sentiment, leading to declines in the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite at the market open.

articles.title: Canadian retail sales up 1% in May on higher gas prices
articles.description: Sales at gas stations and fuel vendors grew 3.1% for the month, despite smaller sales volume

articles.title: 10-year Treasury yield jumps to highest level in over a year as oil surge rattles bond market
articles.description: By John Towfighi, CNN New York (CNN) — Rising oil prices and persistent inflation nerves are rippling through bond markets and pushing up borrowing costs for US consumers. The 10-year US Treasury yield on Thursday rose four basis points, to 4.71%, its highest level since January 2025. The yield rose just above its previous Iran

articles.title: 10-year Treasury yield jumps to highest level in over a year as oil surge rattles bond market
articles.description: Rising oil prices and persistent inflation nerves are rippling through bond markets and pushing up borrowing costs for US consumers.

articles.title: No Decision To Increase Ethanol Blending Beyond 20% In Petrol, Centre Tells Parliament
articles.description: The Centre told Parliament that no decision has been taken to increase ethanol blending in petrol beyond 20 per cent. Minister Suresh Gopi said any future move will follow scientific studies and consultations. The government said E20 fuel has been validated through research and real-world use, with no widespread vehicle damage reported.
